reasoning: Premarket sector rotation shows classic risk-off setup: XLE +0.99% while XLF -0.78% and XLK essentially flat (-0.2%). Energy strength paired with tech flatness and financial weakness indicates defensive rotation and inflation concerns, not growth momentum. SPY down -0.87% with no leadership from its largest sector (tech) — breadth is narrow and deteriorating. Risk-off bias with medium confidence.
key_observations: XLK: -0.2% flat — tech not participating in any leadership, concerning for SPY
XLF: -0.78% down — financials in clear weakness, suggests broad selling pressure
XLE: +0.99% up — energy outperformance in context of equity decline = inflation hedge, not bullish SPY signal
overall rotation: Risk-off setup. Energy defending while traditional growth sectors (tech/financials) lag. Narrow breadth, bearish bias.
